_publications._publicationTitle: A randomized placebo-controlled lovastatin trial for neurobehavioral function in neurofibromatosis I.

_contextSnippet: However, there were no significant treatment effects for nonverbal memory (BVMT, Immediate and Delayed conditions)
details: No significant treatment effects observed for immediate (P = 0.26) or delayed (P = 0.61) conditions, despite improvements in both groups
